description_long: This object is a brooch with a rectangular black base, featuring an ornate arrangement of metallic branches and leaves adorned with spherical, light green gemstones. The decorative motif is concentrated at the center, with the metallic elements radiating outward and intertwining in a naturalistic, floral pattern. The gemstones are set prominently, catching light and providing a striking contrast against the dark background. The brooch appears to be crafted from a combination of metal, likely silver or platinum, and semi-precious stones, possibly jade or peridot. The overall design is elegant and detailed, with a focus on botanical inspiration. The brooch is likely intended to be worn on clothing, such as a lapel or dress, as a statement accessory.
description: A rectangular black brooch with metallic floral branches and light green gemstones, creating an elegant, botanical-inspired accessory.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full floral arrangement and gemstone placement on the brooch's black base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the raised profile of the brooch and the three-dimensional arrangement of the metallic branches.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the brooch, with the decorative elements still visible but less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the depth of the gemstones and the intricate layering of the metallic motif.
